fromProperty.$comment: Cross-doc ref to a property with $id in id_in_properties.json

fromDef.$comment: Cross-doc ref to a $defs entry with $id in id_in_defs.json

fromItems.$comment: Cross-doc ref to items with $id in id_in_items.json

fromContains.$comment: Cross-doc ref to contains with $id in id_in_contains.json

fromNot.$comment: Cross-doc ref to not schema with $id in id_in_not.json
